name: Fastly, Inc.
notes: Fastly’s edge cloud platform helps the world’s most popular digital businesses keep pace with their customer expectations by delivering fast, secure, and scalable online experiences. With points of presence (POPs) across North and South America, Europe, Asia, Africa, Australia, and New Zealand, Fastly peers with other Internet Service Providers (ISPs) and content networks with IPv4 and IPv6 connectivity on Autonomous System (AS) 54113 for the purpose of exchanging traffic between these networks.
